imageAlt: Redesign Contact Screen roadmap item preview image
title: Redesign Contact Screen
summaryBody: To make easier to navigate & tidier - lots of info shown atm and lists not hidden behind ‘entry points’. On the backburner atm until we hear how projects is received (actionability approach) - we’d likely want to do some user testing of this redesign before moving forward with implementation.
